disambiguated.context: At the end of class, the teacher asked a Black student and a European student to stay after so that she could talk to each of them individually. She told the Black student that she was proud of the recent work they had turned in and suggested they consider entering a scholastic bowl. When she talked to the European student, she said how disappointed she was that they weren't keeping up with the other students and suggested some tutors.
disambiguated.question: Who is struggling in the class?
